## Summary

<!-- Describe the change in 1-3 bullets -->

## Issue Linkage (required)

<!-- Use exactly one of the lines below -->
- Closes #<issue-number>
- Refs #<issue-number>

## Branch Strategy

- Branch name should include the primary issue id, for example:
  - `feature/issue-123-short-description`
  - `fix/issue-123-short-description`

## Checklist

- [ ] PR includes `Closes #...` when the issue is fully completed in this PR.
- [ ] PR includes `Refs #...` when work is partial/follow-up and should not auto-close.
- [ ] Branch name includes the related issue id.
